name: Interactive Lab
tagline: Manipulate variables, observe the result, then read why it works.

generation_guidance.tone: curious and encouraging — frame explanation as confirming what the learner just discovered
generation_guidance.pacing: brisk setup, generous exploration, concise theory
avoid: leading with theory before the interactive

best_for: STEM topics where hands-on exploration reveals the concept
lessons where the formula is best understood through manipulation
not_ideal_for: topics that require significant context before interaction makes sense
narrative or history-driven subjects with no quantitative relationships
